understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game was to navigate a grid-based puzzle, adjusting the player's piece attributes (shape, color, rotation) by stepping on modifier tiles to match the requirements of goal cells, then stepping onto those goals to complete all levels.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: The game involved moving a piece on a grid with turns that cost 1 stamina each. Walls (blocked_directions) prevent movement in certain directions. Modifier tiles change the piece's shape (cycles through 6 shapes), color (cycles orange→blue→green→red→orange), or rotation (90° clockwise each step). A goal cell activates only when the piece's shape, color, and rotation match the goal's requirements exactly. Stepping on an activated goal completes it. Stamina reaching 0 costs a life and resets stamina to max; losing all lives ends the game. The player must plan routes efficiently to conserve stamina and lives.

Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game was to navigate a grid-based puzzle, adjusting the player's piece attributes (shape, color, rotation) by stepping on modifier tiles to match the requirements of goal cells, then stepping onto those goals to complete all levels.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: The game involved moving a piece on a grid with turns that cost 1 stamina each. Walls (blocked_directions) prevent movement in certain directions. Modifier tiles change the piece's shape (cycles through 6 shapes), color (cycles orange→blue→green→red→orange), or rotation (90° clockwise each step). A goal cell activates only when the piece's shape, color, and rotation match the goal's requirements exactly. Stepping on an activated goal completes it. Stamina reaching 0 costs a life and resets stamina to max; losing all lives ends the game. The player must plan routes efficiently to conserve stamina and lives.
